LanguageData.UltimateAutoRepair_SelectAreaDesc: Click to choose which allowed area this station monitors for repairs (current: {0}). All Auto Repair Stations on the same map share this setting.
LanguageData.UltimateAutoRepair_ViewStatsDesc: Open the shared repair statistics panel to see all cumulative repairs performed by every station on this map.
LanguageData.UltimateAutoRepair_NoRecords: No repair records yet. Make sure a station is powered and there are damaged buildings or items in the target area.
